stmt: ∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] (Δ : Delta), Odd (Delta.countReft Δ) → Nonempty (GödelFixpoint α) → ∃ x : α, x ≐ Delta.act Δ x
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] (Δ : Delta), Odd (Delta.countReft Δ) → (∃ x : α, x ≐ Delta.act Δ x) → Nonempty (GödelFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] (Δ : Delta), Odd (Delta.countReft Δ) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ Delta.act Δ x ↔ x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] (Δ : Delta), Even (Delta.countReft Δ) → (∃ x : α, x ≐ Delta.act Δ x) → Nonempty (HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] (n : ℕ), 0 < n → ((∃ x : α, x ≐ Delta.act (Delta.pow [Delta.box] n) x) ↔ Nonempty (HenkinFixpoint α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] (n : ℕ), Odd n → ((∃ x : α, x ≐ Delta.act (Delta.pow [Delta.reft] n) x) ↔ Nonempty (GödelFixpoint α))
∀ {α : Type*} [Fintype α] [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α], IsTotal α (· ≤ ·) → ∀ (Δ : Delta), Odd (Delta.countReft Δ) → ∃ x : α, x ≐ Delta.act Δ x
